ListAlarmExecutionStats.states: Filter by alarm state. Values: OK: Recovered, ALERT: Alerting, CLOSED: Closed
ListAlarmExecutionStats.startDateTime: Query start time, UTC, default: 30 days ago
ListAlarmExecutionStats.endDateTime: Query end time, UTC, default: current time
ListAlarmExecutionStats.orderBy: Sort field. Values: totalCount: execution count, failCount: execution failure count, noticeTotalCount: notification count, noticeFailCount: notification failure count
ListAlarmExecutionStats.order: Sort order. Values: asc: ascending, desc: descending, default: desc
ListAlarmExecutionStats.pageSize: Number of items per page, max: 100
